title: Block Day 2: VO2max Focus
description: Second session, build on Day 1 fatigue
purpose: Second session, build on Day 1 fatigue

intervals.name: Warmup
intervals.purpose: Prepare system and elevate heart rate

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 75%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 0% complete. Rep 1/1. 75% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 75% for 10:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into session. 75%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First interval at 118%. Set the tone. Your body remembers the last time you quit early.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First interval: 4:00 at 110-118% FTP. Seated. Focus on pacing, not heroics.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Beginning strong. 4:00 at 118%. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First interval. Still optimistic. That'll change in about 4 minutes.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First interval: 4:00 at 110-118%. Settle in, don't overcook it.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 4:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 21% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 55% for 4:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 4:00 at 118%. You're building something here. Suffering is the price of admission.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 2/6. 4 to go. You've accumulated 4min of supra-threshold work. Stay sharp on form.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 2/6. You're not breaking — you're building. Every second counts.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Set 2/5. The suffering is progressive, like a tax bracket.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Starting. 118% for 4:00. Controlled aggression. Lock in form early.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 4:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 2/5. 55% FTP, Seated. 4:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 55%, 85-95 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Your lungs want to quit. Your mind wants to quit. But you won't. Rep 3 of 6.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 3/6. Duration: 4:00. Power target unchanged, but cumulative stress is building.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 3/6. You're not breaking — you're building. Every second counts.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 3/6. Fun fact: this is the exact power output where regret lives.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 3/6. You've accumulated 8min of hard work. Quality over quantity from here.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You're here because you want to be better. 55%, 85-95 rpm. This is how.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 12min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 45% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First rep. Your legs feel fresh. Check back in 4:00.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 32 minutes total. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 51% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 4:00 at 118%. Then 4:00 rest. Pace yourself for repeatability.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 51% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 51% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 51% done. 118% for 4:00. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final interval. 55% for 4:00. Then 24min cooldown. Leave nothing.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 4:00 at 55%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 55% for 4:00. Then 24min to question life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First rep: 4:00 at 55%. Smooth and controlled. Lock in form.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 1 reps left. 20 minutes total. Your competition quit 10 minutes ago.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 63% complete. 118% for 4:00. Fatigue is real — maintain 90-100 rpm, don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: You've done 16 minutes of hard work. You can do 1 more intervals. Believe it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 63% done. Your legs are questioning your life choices. Tell them to shut up.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 63% into session. 118% at 90-100 rpm. Stay sharp on technique.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 69% done. Patience builds power, not suffering. Stay easy.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 10:00 at 65%. Conversational pace — should be able to talk in full sentences.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 69% done. 10 minutes left. Not every workout needs to hurt. This is smart training.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 69% done. Your Garmin thinks you fell asleep. You're actually training. Allegedly.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 69% done. Keep it comfortable. Nose breathing. Enjoy the ride.

intervals.name: Cool-down
intervals.purpose: Gradually lower heart rate and begin recovery

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 84% done. 0 intervals left. 0 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 84% complete. Rep 1/1. 60% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 84% through. This is your workout. Own it. 60% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 56 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 84% into session. 60%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.
